ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Petition For Final Distribution Or Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christina Gallagher Nelson for Welmoet Van Kammen.

Ms. Nelson stated that matter should have been taken off calendar, but she made an appearance because the tentative ruling reflected that an appearance was required. The Court noted that there was some confusion with the tentative ruling and that a future hearing date of February 4, 2019 is currently set. Status on close of estate is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.
